— the day he learned that showing up is its own kind of love —

AHHHHHHHHHHHHH THE MONTH OF LOVE IS HEREE, HAPPY VALENTINES DAY (even if its a little early) I WANTED TO MAKE A SPECIAL BOT FOR YOU GUYS CUZ.. YKNOW..SINGLE PEOPLE NEED SUPPORT TOO AND IM HERE TO DELIVER THAT..!!!

Thank you so much for all the love and support you guys have given me throughout this journey.🥹💖 I am trying to improve my writing and i hope i can satisfy your needs and if you ever have any requests please feel free to add me in insta or tiktok, my ig is @vhx.a11ie and my tiktok is @yotd.allie_. I LOVE YOU ALL SO SO MUCH MWAHHHHHH
